description: Replace the placeholder 5-module seed with the full 18-module, 85-lesson curriculum defined in apps/codecamp-advantage/measure/curriculum/. Adds phase column to schema, rewrites the seed, wires phase-grouped queries to the UI, and validates with tests.
deviation_notes: Phase 6-8 tasks added during implementation for domain/router updates, UI updates, and validation. Seed data expanded from 5 to 18 modules across 4 phases.
